title: KSMS School ERP
summary: A full-featured School ERP system with role-based access for admins, teachers, students, and parents — streamlining academics, attendance, fees, and communication.
description: KSMS School ERP is a comprehensive school management platform built on the MERN stack. It provides role-based dashboards for administrators, teachers, students, and parents — each with tailored access and functionality. The system covers the full school workflow: student admissions and profiles, class and section management, attendance tracking, exam scheduling and result management, fee collection with payment history, timetable generation, and internal notices. A dedicated school website is also included, giving the institution a professional public presence. The platform is hosted on a VPS for full control, reliability, and data privacy.
results: Reduced manual administrative work by automating attendance, fee tracking, and report generation
Enabled real-time parent-teacher communication through integrated notice and messaging system
Centralized student data across admissions, academics, and finance in a single platform
Delivered role-specific dashboards for 4 user types: admin, teacher, student, and parent
Improved fee collection efficiency with digital payment tracking and receipt generation

title: Traders Mart
summary: A modern B2C ecommerce platform with a decoupled architecture — separate storefront, API server, and admin panel.
description: Traders Mart is a B2C ecommerce platform built with a clean three-layer architecture. The public storefront delivers a fast, responsive shopping experience. A dedicated API server handles all business logic and data operations. A separate admin panel gives the client full control over products, orders, and inventory — all independently deployable and easy to scale.

title: Expertsofdeals
summary: A B2B marketplace platform connecting global suppliers and buyers — enabling seamless product discovery, verified business listings, and direct trade inquiries worldwide.
description: Expertsofdeals is a B2B trade platform designed to bridge the gap between suppliers and buyers across the globe. Businesses can create verified company profiles, list their products or services, and receive direct inquiries from potential buyers. The platform features smart search and filtering to help buyers find the right suppliers by category, location, and product type. Suppliers get a dedicated dashboard to manage their listings, track leads, and respond to inquiries efficiently. Built on the MERN stack with Next.js for a fast, SEO-optimized public-facing experience, the platform is structured to scale as new industries and regions are onboarded.
results: Built a scalable supplier-buyer marketplace supporting multi-category product listings
Implemented verified business profiles to build trust across global trade connections
Delivered SEO-optimized public pages to drive organic traffic from international buyers
Enabled direct inquiry system allowing buyers to contact suppliers without intermediaries
Integrated smart search and category filtering to improve product discovery experience

title: KSMS Lucknow
summary: A professional school website for KSMS Lucknow — showcasing academics, admissions, faculty, and school activities with a clean and modern design.
description: KSMS Lucknow's website serves as the digital face of the institution. It presents essential information for parents and students — including academic programs, admission procedures, faculty profiles, school events, and contact details. Built with performance and SEO in mind, the site ensures the school ranks well in local searches and delivers a smooth browsing experience across all devices. The clean layout and intuitive navigation reflect the school's commitment to professionalism and accessibility.
results: Delivered a fully responsive school website accessible across all devices and screen sizes
Improved school's online presence with SEO-optimized pages for local search visibility
Structured clear navigation for academics, admissions, faculty, and contact information
Reduced parent inquiries by providing all essential school information in one place

title: Vindhya Academy
summary: A modern, responsive website for Vindhya Academy — built to establish a strong digital presence and help parents and students easily access school information.
description: Vindhya Academy's website was designed to give the institution a credible and professional online identity. The site highlights the school's vision, academic offerings, admission process, and key achievements. Built with Next.js and TailwindCSS, it loads fast and ranks well on search engines. Parents can quickly find information about fee structure, school timings, faculty, and how to get in touch — all presented through a clean, easy-to-navigate interface optimized for both desktop and mobile users.
results: Established a strong digital identity for the school with a professional and modern design
Optimized for local SEO to help parents discover the school through search engines
Provided a mobile-first experience ensuring smooth access on smartphones and tablets
Organized key information — admissions, faculty, academics — into a clear and accessible layout
